nodes.name: Ninox
nodes.summary: Ninox（Ninox）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联35种鸟类，如Rufous owl、Powerful owl、Barking owl等35种鸟类。

nodes.name: Alor boobook
nodes.summary: The Alor boobook (Ninox plesseni) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. It is native to Pantar and Alor Islands in the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands. It was previously considered a subspecies of the Australian boobook, before being reclassified as its own species due to bioacoustic data in 2017. References
